title: Swordish
description: Adds a few thoughtful vanilla plus weapons
body:
Swordish is a simple melee weapons mod that adds a few sword alternatives, while keeping gameplay balanced.
Currently there are 3 new weapon types:

**Halberds**: _Long twohanded axe-pikes_
![Iron Halberd (Held)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c3d31ce78e924d85f6232c58e6d84f7974792b.png)

**Glaives**: _Long twohanded knife-on-a-stick_
![Iron Glaive (Held)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a18872a2ab813c58e66548820e9ef28326f9fe.png)

**Dualblade**: _Double sided twohanded sword that preforms powerful sweed attacks, but cannot critical hit._
![Iron Dualblade (Held)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a23b1141b986e5c9ef46f17811bc16df45df47b.png)

## Vanill Axe Rebalance

Swordish also Rebalances vanilla axes, making them have a consistant attack speed and each tier being 2 more attack damage than thier sword equivelents, bringing them more in line with combat test snapshot axes.

This Mod Requires _Twohanded Engine_!
Critical Values and Twohanded mechanics will not be present if Twohanded Engine is missing!

Swordish Textures By Eko!
